scripts.build: npm run ensure:wasm-bridge && npm run build -w @ttoon/shared
scripts.test: npm run ensure:wasm-bridge && npm run test -w @ttoon/shared
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm run ensure:wasm-bridge && npm pack -w @ttoon/shared --dry-run && npm pack -w @ttoon/node --dry-run && npm pack -w @ttoon/web --dry-run
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run test && npm run pack:dry-run
